summary: Full end-to-end testing of the new CMS Pages feature (backend + admin UI + public rendering). Backend: added /app/backend/tests/test_pages.py with 15 targeted tests — auth on all admin endpoints, auto-slug from title, duplicate-slug auto-suffix (not 409), draft hidden from public list & 404 on /pages/{slug}, POST /admin/pages/{id}/status publishes and sets published_at, invalid status → 400, PUT auto-sets published_at on transition to published, PUT slug rename respects uniqueness (suffix), nav_only=true filter, DELETE 200 + 404 on second delete, full Page model exposes every field (title/slug/summary/content_html/cover_image/gallery/icon/category/tags/status/parent_id/order/show_in_main_nav/author_email/published_at/created_at/updated_at/seo{9 sub-fields}). ALL 15/15 pages tests + 31/32 legacy backend tests still pass (1 xfail unchanged from iter3). Frontend (Playwright, logged in as admin@stmpagri.ci): sidebar 'Pages' link OK; /admin/pages shows header + search + status filter + table with existing 'À propos de STMP Agri' row (published badge); 'Nouvelle page' navigates to /admin/pages/nouveau; all 4 tabs render (tab-content/tab-media/tab-seo/tab-settings) and every declared data-testid was found (page-title, page-slug, page-summary, page-content, page-cover, page-cover-upload-btn, page-gallery, page-gallery-upload-btn, all 9 seo-*, page-parent, page-order, page-category, page-tags, page-show-in-nav, page-status, page-save-draft-btn, page-publish-btn). Typing the title auto-fills slug ('TEST UI Auto Slug Page' → 'test-ui-auto-slug-page'). TipTap .ProseMirror accepts keyboard input. SEO Google preview reflects meta_title in real time. Save draft transitions URL from /nouveau to /admin/pages/{id}; Publish then sets status. Public rendering at /p/test-ui-full-flow-page: hero + breadcrumb + title + summary + WYSIWYG body inside .tiptap-render + tags row (#test #ui #page). React-Helmet-async injects <title>=meta_title, <meta name=robots>, canonical, og:title/og:description/og:image/og:type=article/og:url and twitter:card/twitter:title correctly. Test page cleaned up at end. NB: 'À propos de STMP Agri' page preserved as requested.

integration_issues.issue: The default <meta name="description" content="A product of emergent.sh"> from /public/index.html is NOT removed/overridden when react-helmet-async injects the page-specific meta description. querySelectorAll returns TWO tags in this order: [1] 'A product of emergent.sh' (from index.html), [2] the page's seo.meta_description (from Helmet). Search engines & scrapers may pick the first one. Other Helmet-managed tags (title, og:*, twitter:*, canonical, robots) correctly override because index.html doesn't define them (or the default was consumed). Fix: remove the default <meta name="description"> from /app/frontend/public/index.html OR ensure Helmet uses the same tag (Helmet normally replaces by name — verify HelmetProvider is mounted before app render).

action_items: Remove or replace the default <meta name="description" content="A product of emergent.sh"> in /app/frontend/public/index.html so that Helmet-managed page description is the only one present on /p/:slug (currently duplicated).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _ensure_unique_slug uses random suffix new_id()[:6] — non-deterministic; acceptable but could cause surprise on rename. Consider a counter-based suffix (-2, -3…) like WordPress.

PUT /admin/pages accepts author_email from existing doc only — good; POST correctly enforces JWT email. No sanitization of content_html — XSS-safe only because admin-only; acceptable per problem statement.
GET /admin/pages returns raw docs without response_model=List[Page] so extra fields could leak; low risk since only admins call it.
No pagination on GET /admin/pages (limit 1000) — fine for now but will need cursoring at scale.
Frontend duplicate meta description: HelmetProvider is set up but the base index.html default is never removed; consider deleting it in index.html since PublicPage always sets one.

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 new pages tests + 31/32 legacy regression, 1 pre-existing xfail unchanged)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of declared testids and flows verified (list, editor 4 tabs, WYSIWYG typing, SEO preview, save→publish→public render→helmet SEO)

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral pages created via pytest fixtures are cleaned up in fixture teardown. One additional 'TEST UI Full Flow Page' created via browser was explicitly DELETE'd at end. 'À propos de STMP Agri' preserved as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS Pages feature is production-ready. Backend endpoints /api/pages (public list), /api/pages/{slug}, /api/admin/pages (CRUD), /api/admin/pages/{id}/status all working. WYSIWYG is TipTap: use `await page.click('.ProseMirror'); await page.keyboard.type(...)`. All required data-testids present. Only follow-up: strip duplicate <meta name="description"> default from /app/frontend/public/index.html.
